author: lianqing1
title: Race Condition in save_state() — Concurrent Writes Corrupt State File
notes: Central claim (no concurrency protection → partial writes corrupt state file) is factually wrong. save_state() delegates to safe_write_text() which uses tempfile.mkstemp + os.replace — atomic on POSIX, no partial writes possible. Lost-updates concern (last writer wins) is technically valid but trivial for a single-user CLI tool. Generic observation about missing file locking, severity overstated as 'High — data loss in production use'.
